query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, TABLE_ROWS FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_ROWS > 0 ORDER BY TABLE_ROWS DESC;
